expectations.evidence: No CDN links, external stylesheets, or external script references found. All CSS is inline in a <style> block and all JavaScript is inline in a <script> block. No href="http" or src="http" references to external resources.

Four tab buttons present: Strategy (line 601), Timeline (line 602), Feasibility (line 603), Comments (line 604). Each has a corresponding tab-content div: tab-strategy, tab-timeline, tab-feasibility, tab-comments.

All 5 required functions are present and exposed on window: handleTextSelection (line 996), saveComment (line 1072), deleteComment (line 1093), renderComments (line 1121), exportFeedback (line 1208). The system supports text selection, popup comment entry, highlight marking, and feedback export.
